# fasit_environment (Resource)

Resource for creating and managing fasit environments



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `kind` (String) Environment kind
- `name` (String) Environment name
- `tenant_id` (String) Tenant ID

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Tenant ID
